info.title: DLMM API
info.description: Indexed DLMM data for pools, portfolios, positions, limit orders, wallets, and protocol stats.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of pools

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of pools to return per page. Max 1000

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query used to match pools by name, tokens, or address

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description:
Sort results by one or more fields

Format:
- Time-windowed metrics: `<metric>_<window>:<direction>`
- Non-windowed metrics: `<field>:<direction>`

- `direction`: `asc` or `desc`
- `window` (when applicable): `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

Available fields:
- Time-windowed metrics: `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Non-windowed metrics: `tvl` `fee_pct` `bin_step` `pool_created_at` `farm_apy`

Default: `volume_24h:desc`

Examples:
- `volume_24h:desc`
- `fee_1h:asc`
- `tvl:desc`

parameters.name: filter_by
parameters.description:
Conditions to filter documents by field values

Format: `<expr> [&& <expr> ...]`

Where each expression is: `<field><op><value>`

Allowed fields:
- Numeric: `tvl` `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Boolean: `is_blacklisted`
- Text: `pool_address` `name` `token_x` `token_y`

Operators:
- Numeric: `=` `>` `>=` `<` `<=`
- Boolean: `=true` `=false`
- Text:
  - exact match: `=<value>`
  - multi-value OR: `=[value1|value2|...]`

Notes:
- Multiple expressions are combined using logical **AND** (`&&`)
- Whitespace around operators is ignored

Examples:
- `tvl>1000`
- `is_blacklisted=false && volume_24h>=50000`

dynamic_fee_pct.description: Dynamic fee rate. Which is equal to base fee + variable fee.

fee_tvl_ratio.description: Fee TVL ratio in percentage in different timeframes

has_farm.description: Whether the pool has a farm or not

is_blacklisted.description: Flag to indicate whether the pair is blacklisted

protocol_fees.description: Protocol fee data in different timeframes

reserve_x.description: Address of token X reserve of the liquidity pair

reserve_y.description: Address of token Y reserve of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_x.description: Address of the farming reward X of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_y.description: Address of the farming reward Y of the liquidity pair

token_x.description: Token X of the liquidity pair

token_x_amount.description: Token X amount the liquidity pair hold

token_y.description: Token Y of the liquidity pair

token_y_amount.description: Token Y amount the liquidity pair hold

tvl.description: Total liquidity the liquidity pair holding. Also known as Total Value Locked

get.description: Returns a paginated list of pool groups

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of pools to return per page. Max 100

get.description: Returns a paginated list of pools that belong to a specific pool group

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of pools to return per page. Max 100

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query used to match pools by name, tokens, or address

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description:
Sort results by one or more fields

Format:
- Time-windowed metrics: `<metric>_<window>:<direction>`
- Non-windowed metrics: `<field>:<direction>`

Default: `volume_24h:desc`

Examples:

get.description: Returns metadata and current state for a single pool

Returns OHLCV candles for a single pool over a time range

**Notes**
- If both `start_time` and `end_time` are provided, candles are returned in the range `[start_time, end_time]`
- If only one of `start_time` or `end_time` is provided, the missing bound is inferred using the selected `timeframe`
- If neither is provided, a default range is used based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description:
Candle interval

Allowed values `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

If omitted, the API uses `24h`

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses a default range based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses "now" as the end

get.description:
Returns historical volume for a pool aggregated into time buckets

**Notes**
- If both `start_time` and `end_time` are provided, the result covers the range `[start_time, end_time]`
- If only one of `start_time` or `end_time` is provided, the missing bound is inferred using the selected `timeframe`
- If neither is provided, a default range is used based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description:
Timeframe

Allowed values `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

If omitted, the API uses `24h`

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses a default range based on `timeframe`

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description:
Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

If omitted, the API uses "now" as the end

get.summary: Get user portfolio with all pools containing closed positions
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of pools where the user has closed positions,
sorted by most recent activity (last_closed_at DESC). The response includes:
- Pool metadata (address, token symbols, icons, fees)
- Aggregated PnL data (deposits, withdrawals, fees, total PnL)
- Per-token breakdowns (X and Y)

For detailed position history within each pool, call the /positions/{pool_address}/pnl endpoint.



# Arguments

* `user` - The wallet address of the user
* `page` - Page number for pagination (default: 1)
* `page_size` - Number of pools per page (default: 120, max: 365)
* `days_back` - Only include pools with positions closed within this many days (default: 90)

# Returns

* `200` - The user's portfolio with pool metadata and aggregated PnL
* `400` - Invalid user address or query parameters

parameters.name: days_back
parameters.description:
Only include pools with positions closed within this many days
Applied only for closed positions
(minimum: 1, maximum: 365, default: 120)

get.summary: Get user portfolio with all pools containing open positions
get.description:
Returns a paginated list of pools where the user has open (active) positions.
The response includes:
- Pool metadata (address, bin step, base fee, token symbols, icons)
- Current balances and unclaimed fees in USD and SOL
- Pool metrics (TVL, 24h volume, fee/TVL ratio)
- List of open position addresses for each pool
- Aggregated total metrics across all pools (balances, unclaimed fees, PnL) in USD and SOL
- SOL price used for conversion (omitted if unavailable)

Results can be sorted by various metrics and support pagination.

# Arguments

* `user` - The wallet address of the user
* `page` - Page number for pagination (default: 1, minimum: 1)
* `page_size` - Number of pools per page (default: 20, maximum: 50)
* `sort_by` - Field to sort by: `current_balances`, `unclaimed_fee`, `pool_tvl`,
  `pool_volume_24h`, or `fee_per_tvl_24h` (default: `current_balances`)
* `sort_direction` - Sort direction: `asc` or `desc` (default: `desc`)

# Returns

* `200` - The user's open portfolio with pool metadata, balances, and total metrics
* `400` - Invalid user address or query parameters

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort by field, default is current_balances

400.description: Invalid user address or query parameters

get.summary: Get total portfolio PnL across all pools
get.description:
Returns the all-time total PnL in USD and percentage change across all user's pools.
This aggregates data from all closed positions across the entire portfolio.

# Arguments

* `user` - The wallet address of the user

# Returns

* `200` - The user's total portfolio PnL
* `400` - Invalid user address or query parameters

400.description: Invalid user address or unsupported product type

get.summary: Get the historical events for a position
get.description:
This endpoint returns the historical actions for a position.

# Arguments

* `address` - The address of the position

# Returns

* `200` - The historical actions for the position

parameters.name: event_type
parameters.description:
Filter by event type (add, remove, claim_fee, claim_reward).
If not provided, returns all event types.

parameters.name: order_direction
parameters.description:
Order direction for sorting events by block time.
- `asc`: Oldest events first
- `desc`: Most recent events first (default)

get.summary: Get position PnL data (open and closed positions with on-the-fly calculation)
get.description:
Returns positions for a specific pool and user with calculated PnL values.
Includes SOL-denominated amounts when SOL price is available (omitted otherwise).
Results can be filtered by status (open/closed) and are paginated.

# Arguments

* `pool_address` - The address of the pool
* `user` - The user address
* `status` - Filter by status: "open", "closed", or omit for all (default: all)
* `page` - Page number starting from 1 (default: 1)

# Returns

* `200` - Paginated list of positions with PnL data in USD and SOL

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Page size for pagination (minimum: 1, maximum: 100, default: 20)

get.description: Returns aggregated protocol-level metrics across all pools

Paginated per-pool summary of the wallet's closed limit orders, sorted by
`last_closed_at` DESC. A limit order is closed iff it has a row in
`close_limit_orders` — cancel-only orders remain in `/open`.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default: 20, max: 1000

get.summary: Get Closed Limit Orders For Pool
get.description:
Paginated per-order lifecycle view for the wallet's closed limit orders in
one pool, sorted by `last_closed_at` DESC.
get.operationId: Get Closed Limit Orders For Pool

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default: 20, max: 1000

get.description:
Paginated per-pool summary of the wallet's live limit orders, sorted by
deposit USD DESC. A limit order is live until it has a `close_limit_orders`
row — cancels do not remove it from this view.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default: 20, max: 1000

get.summary: Get Open Limit Orders For Pool
get.description:
Paginated per-order detail for the wallet's live limit orders in one pool,
sorted by placement time DESC. "Live" = has no `close_limit_orders` row.
get.operationId: Get Open Limit Orders For Pool

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Number of results per page. Default: 20, max: 1000

get.description:
Returns the total realized bonus a wallet has claimed on one DLMM pool,
aggregated across every cancel event the wallet has on the pool. Includes
cancels on orders that have not yet been closed (a cancel pays bonus
immediately; the on-chain account is closed separately via
`CloseLimitOrderIfEmpty`). USD/SOL values are derived using each cancel
row's stored cancel-time price ratios — not current spot.

Returns aggregate totals for a user's limit orders across all pools:
open/closed order counts, total deposit value, and total bonus fees earned.
"Open" means placed with no `close_limit_orders` row. "Closed" means the
order has a `close_limit_orders` row (`CloseLimitOrderIfEmpty` was invoked).
Returns combined total claimed fees and rewards for a wallet in a specific pool

BonusClaimedResponse.description:
Realized bonus a wallet has claimed on one pool. Aggregates every cancel
event the wallet has on the pool, including cancels on orders that have
not yet been closed. USD/SOL values are priced from each cancel row's own
`amount_*_usd` / `amount_*_sol` ratios (cancel-time prices), not current
spot.

cancel_event_count.description: Number of distinct cancel events contributing to these totals.

total_bonus_x.description: Bonus token X claimed, in token X display units (decimals applied).

total_bonus_x_sol.description: Bonus token X claimed, in SOL (cancel-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_usd.description: Bonus token X claimed, in USD (cancel-time price).

total_bonus_y.description: Bonus token Y claimed, in token Y display units (decimals applied).

total_bonus_y_sol.description: Bonus token Y claimed, in SOL (cancel-time SOL price).

total_bonus_y_usd.description: Bonus token Y claimed, in USD (cancel-time price).

ClosedLimitOrderDetail.description:
Per-order lifecycle row for a closed limit order in a specific pool.
Pool-level metadata (pair, bin step, fees, tokens) lives once at the top of
the response — see `ClosedLimitOrdersForPoolResponse`.

last_closed_at.description: Unix seconds. Block time of the close event.

output_amount_expected.description:
Expected output at placement bin prices — `amount_y` for asks,
`amount_x` for bids. Pre-computed on the
`limit_orders_aggregate.output_amount_expected` column by the open
MV via `if(is_ask_side, amount_y, amount_x)`; the closed-detail SQL
reads the stored value directly. Mirrors
`OpenLimitOrderDetail::output_amount_expected`.

received_output_amount.description:
Output token amount received for the filled portion of this order, in
output-token display units. Sourced from cancel events: the cancel
instruction emits the output-side token alongside any unfilled deposit
remainder. For an ask order this is `total_withdrawal_y`; for a bid
order it is `total_withdrawal_x`.

total_bonus_sol.description: SOL value of bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_usd.description: USD value of token X bonus (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_bonus_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y bonus (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_deposit_sol.description: SOL value of deposits, deposit-side only (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: USD value of deposits, deposit-side only (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_withdrawal_sol.description: SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time USD price).

last_closed_at.description: Unix seconds. Latest close-event block time for this pool.

total_bonus_sol.description: SOL value of bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_usd.description: USD value of token X bonus (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_bonus_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y bonus (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_deposit_sol.description: SOL value of deposits, deposit-side only (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: USD value of deposits, deposit-side only (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits (placement-time price; only ask orders deposit X).

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits (placement-time price; only bid orders deposit Y).

total_withdrawal_sol.description: SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time USD price).

ClosedLimitOrdersForPoolResponse.description:
Top-level response for `GET /wallets/{wallet}/limit_orders/closed/pools/{pool_address}`.
Pool metadata is emitted once at the top; per-order rows in `data` only
carry order-specific fields.

fee_tvl_ratio_tw.description: Time window to aggregate fee tvl ratio. Returns Max

Conditions to filter documents by field values

Format: `<expr> [&& <expr> ...]`

Where each expression is: `<field><op><value>`

Allowed fields:
- Numeric: `tvl` `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Boolean: `is_blacklisted`
- Text: `pool_address` `name` `token_x` `token_y`

Operators:
- Numeric: `=` `>` `>=` `<` `<=`
- Boolean: `=true` `=false`
- Text:
  - exact match: `=<value>`
  - multi-value OR: `=[value1|value2|...]`

Notes:
- Multiple expressions are combined using logical **AND** (`&&`)
- Whitespace around operators is ignored

Examples:
- `tvl>1000`
- `is_blacklisted=false && volume_24h>=50000`

page_size.description: Number of pools to return per page. Max 100

query.description: Search query used to match pools by name, tokens, or address

sort_by.description:
Sort results by one or more fields

Format:

- Non-windowed metrics: `<field>:<direction>`

- `direction`: `asc` or `desc`
- `window` (when applicable): `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

Default: `volume_24h:desc`

volume_tw.description: Time window to aggregate volume. Returns sum

GetOpenPortfolioQuery.description:
Query parameters for getting user's open portfolio

Used to retrieve a paginated list of pools where the user has open (active) positions.
Supports sorting by various metrics and pagination.

sort_by.description: Sort by field, default is current_balances

totalPositions.description: Total number of open positions across all pools

GetPoolPositionPnLQuery.description: Query parameters for getting position PnL data

page_size.description: Page size for pagination (minimum: 1, maximum: 100, default: 20)

filter_by.description:
Conditions to filter documents by field values

Format: `<expr> [&& <expr> ...]`

Where each expression is: `<field><op><value>`

Allowed fields:
- Numeric: `tvl` `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Boolean: `is_blacklisted`
- Text: `pool_address` `name` `token_x` `token_y`

Operators:
- Numeric: `=` `>` `>=` `<` `<=`
- Boolean: `=true` `=false`
- Text:
  - exact match: `=<value>`
  - multi-value OR: `=[value1|value2|...]`

Notes:
- Multiple expressions are combined using logical **AND** (`&&`)
- Whitespace around operators is ignored

Examples:
- `tvl>1000`
- `is_blacklisted=false && volume_24h>=50000`

page_size.description: Number of pools to return per page. Max 1000

query.description: Search query used to match pools by name, tokens, or address

sort_by.description:
Sort results by one or more fields

Format:
- Time-windowed metrics: `<metric>_<window>:<direction>`
- Non-windowed metrics: `<field>:<direction>`

- `direction`: `asc` or `desc`
- `window` (when applicable): `5m` `30m` `1h` `2h` `4h` `12h` `24h`

Available fields:
- Time-windowed metrics: `volume_*` `fee_*` `fee_tvl_ratio_*` `apr_*`
- Non-windowed metrics: `tvl` `fee_pct` `bin_step` `pool_created_at` `farm_apy`

GetPortfolioQuery.description: Query parameters for getting user portfolio

days_back.description:
Only include pools with positions closed within this many days
Applied only for closed positions
(minimum: 1, maximum: 365, default: 120)

GetPortfolioResponse.description: User portfolio response with aggregated pool data

totalPositions.description: Total number of closed positions across all pools

GetPortfolioTotalQuery.description: Query parameters for getting portfolio totals

GetPositionHistoricalEventsQuery.description: Query parameters for getting historical events for a position

oneOf.description:
Filter by event type (add, remove, claim_fee, claim_reward).
If not provided, returns all event types.

Order direction for sorting events by block time.
- `asc`: Oldest events first
- `desc`: Most recent events first (default)

LimitOrderPoolDetails.description:
Pool-level metadata shared across all limit-order responses for a given
pool. Same shape on both the open- and closed-order endpoints so clients
can render the pool header from a single struct.

base_fee.description: Pool base fee as a percentage (f64 serialized as string to preserve precision).

bin_step.description: Pool bin step in basis points (on-chain u16).

collect_fee_mode.description:
0 = `InputOnly` (bonus flows to the deposit/input token),
1 = `OnlyY` (bonus always in token Y regardless of side).

LimitOrderSummaryResponse.description:
Summary totals for a user's limit orders across every pool. `_sol` variants
follow two different time bases:
- `total_deposit_sol` — SOL value at *placement time* (SOL price frozen when
  the PlaceLimitOrderEvt was indexed).
- `total_bonus_sol` — SOL value at *current spot* (current SOL price applied
  to the running bonus accrual).

"Open" means placed with no row in `close_limit_orders`. "Closed" means an
`close_limit_orders` row exists. Cancel events are not terminal — a
cancelled-but-not-closed order is still open.

closed_orders.description: Number of limit orders that have been closed on-chain.

open_orders.description: Number of limit orders that are still open (no close event).

total_bonus_sol.description: Total SOL value of bonus accrued across open orders (current spot SOL price).

total_bonus_usd.description: Total USD value of bonus (pro-rata fee share) accrued across open orders.

total_deposit_sol.description: Total SOL value of currently-open order deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: Total USD value of currently-open order deposits.

LimitOrdersPaginationQuery.description: Query parameters for paginated limit order endpoints.

page_size.description: Number of results per page. Default: 20, max: 1000

OpenLimitOrderBinPoint.description:
Per-bin point in an open limit order's distribution. Amounts are in the
input (deposit) token's display units — token X for an ask, token Y for a
bid — matching the order-level `filled_input_amount`.

deposit_amount.description:
Original deposit at this bin in input-token display units. The
frontend's bar-chart heights are derived from `deposit_amount × price`
(i.e. the notional in output-token terms) — no per-bin USD field is
exposed since order-level totals carry the dollar/SOL values.

fulfilled_amount.description: Filled portion in input-token display units.

output_received_amount.description:
Output-token amount received from this bin's fills, in output-token
display units. Ask: `fulfilled_amount × price`. Bid: `fulfilled_amount /
price`.

price.description: Price at this bin (token Y per token X).

unfilled_amount.description: Remaining unfilled portion in input-token display units.

OpenLimitOrderDetail.description:
Per-order detail for a live limit order inside a specific pool. Amounts use
the `input`/`output` terminology (input is the deposited token, output is
the expected fill token) to abstract ask/bid semantics for the frontend.
Pool-level metadata (pair, bin step, fees, tokens, current pool state) lives
once at the top of the response — see `OpenLimitOrdersForPoolResponse`.

filled_input_amount.description: Filled amount expressed in input (deposit) token units.

is_ask_side.description: true = ask (selling X for Y), false = bid (buying X with Y).

nearest_unfilled_bin_id.description:
Bin id of the nearest still-unfilled (or partially-filled) bin to the
current active bin. `None` only when every bin in the order is
fulfilled. Tie-broken to the lower `bin_id`.

nearest_unfilled_bin_price.description:
Price of `nearest_unfilled_bin_id` (same units as `current_pool_price`
on the enclosing response wrapper). `None` only when fully filled.
Frontend computes the percentage distance as
`(nearest_unfilled_bin_price - current_pool_price) / current_pool_price`.

output_amount_expected.description:
Expected output at placement bin prices — `amount_y` for asks,
`amount_x` for bids. Pre-computed on the
`limit_orders_aggregate.output_amount_expected` column by the open
MV via `if(is_ask_side, amount_y, amount_x)`, so this field is just
the stored value (no per-bin math at request time).

total_bonus_sol.description: SOL value of bonus (current spot SOL price).

total_filled_amount.description:
Total filled amount in *output* token display units — what the user has
received. Computed as `Σ fulfilled_at_bin × bin_price` for asks, or
`Σ fulfilled / bin_price` for bids. Each bin's price is fixed by the
program at fill time, so this is the close estimate of the on-chain
output (a true figure is only emitted at cancel).

total_unfilled_amount.description:
Total unfilled deposit in input-token display units
(`input_amount - filled_input_amount`).

OpenLimitOrderPoolSummary.description:
Pool-grouped summary of a user's live limit orders within a single pool.
`fully_filled_orders` counts orders whose summed `fulfilled_amount` across
bins has reached the summed `lo_amount` (deposit-amount weighted, matching
the per-order `filled_pct == 100`).

total_bonus_sol.description: SOL value of bonus (current spot SOL price).

total_deposit_sol.description: SOL value of deposits, deposit-side only (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: USD value of deposits, deposit-side only (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits (placement-time price; only ask orders deposit X).

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits (placement-time price; only bid orders deposit Y).

total_withdrawal_sol.description: SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn from cancel events (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn from cancel events (cancel-event-time USD price).

OpenLimitOrdersForPoolResponse.description:
Top-level response for `GET /wallets/{wallet}/limit_orders/open/pools/{pool_address}`.
Pool metadata and live pool state are emitted once at the top; per-order
rows in `data` only carry order-specific fields.

current_active_bin_id.description: Live active bin id from the dynamic pool cache.

current_pool_price.description: Pool's live price (token Y per token X) from the dynamic pool cache.

last_closed_at.description: Unix seconds. Latest close-event block time for this pool.

total_bonus_sol.description: SOL value of bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_x_usd.description: USD value of token X bonus (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_bonus_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y bonus (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_bonus_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y bonus (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_deposit_sol.description: SOL value of deposits, deposit-side only (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: USD value of deposits, deposit-side only (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits (placement-time price; only ask orders deposit X).

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits (placement-time price; only bid orders deposit Y).

total_withdrawal_sol.description: SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time USD price).

items.description:
Pool-grouped summary of a user's live limit orders within a single pool.
`fully_filled_orders` counts orders whose summed `fulfilled_amount` across
bins has reached the summed `lo_amount` (deposit-amount weighted, matching
the per-order `filled_pct == 100`).

total_bonus_sol.description: SOL value of bonus (current spot SOL price).

total_deposit_sol.description: SOL value of deposits, deposit-side only (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_usd.description: USD value of deposits, deposit-side only (an ask deposits X, a bid deposits Y).

total_deposit_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_x_usd.description: USD value of token X deposits (placement-time price; only ask orders deposit X).

total_deposit_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y deposits (placement-time SOL price).

total_deposit_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y deposits (placement-time price; only bid orders deposit Y).

total_withdrawal_sol.description: SOL value of withdrawals (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_sol.description: SOL value of token X withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_x_usd.description: USD value of token X withdrawn from cancel events (cancel-event-time USD price).

total_withdrawal_y_sol.description: SOL value of token Y withdrawn (cancel-event-time SOL price).

total_withdrawal_y_usd.description: USD value of token Y withdrawn from cancel events (cancel-event-time USD price).

dynamic_fee_pct.description: Dynamic fee rate. Which is equal to base fee + variable fee.

fee_tvl_ratio.description: Fee TVL ratio in percentage in different timeframes

has_farm.description: Whether the pool has a farm or not

is_blacklisted.description: Flag to indicate whether the pair is blacklisted

protocol_fees.description: Protocol fee data in different timeframes

reserve_x.description: Address of token X reserve of the liquidity pair

reserve_y.description: Address of token Y reserve of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_x.description: Address of the farming reward X of the liquidity pair

reward_mint_y.description: Address of the farming reward Y of the liquidity pair

token_x.description: Token X of the liquidity pair

token_x_amount.description: Token X amount the liquidity pair hold

token_y.description: Token Y of the liquidity pair

token_y_amount.description: Token Y amount the liquidity pair hold

tvl.description: Total liquidity the liquidity pair holding. Also known as Total Value Locked

protocol_fee_pct.description: Protocol fee rate. A cut from trade fee.

PoolOpenPortfolioItem.description: Aggregated portfolio data for a single pool

feePerTvl24h.description: User's fee per tvl in rolling 24h

listPositions.description: List of position addresses in pool

outOfRange.description:
Pool dynamic fields
Pool is out of range if one of the user's positions is out of range
If this is None, it means we couldn't determine out_of_range status

positionsOutOfRange.description: List of position addresses that are out of range

totalDepositSol.description: Total deposit in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

PoolPortfolioItem.description: Aggregated portfolio data for a single pool

pnlSol.description: Total PnL in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

pnlUsd.description: Total PnL in USD, including realized and unrealized

totalDepositSol.description: Total deposit in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

totalFeeSol.description: Total claim fee in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

totalWithdrawalSol.description: Total withdrawal in SOL (historical per-event SOL price)

is_blacklisted.description: Flag to indicate whether the pair is blacklisted

reserve_y.description: Address of token Y reserve of the liquidity pair

Total amount deposited in USD across all pools

Total PnL in USD across all pools

oneOf.description: Live PnL, only for open positions

TotalMetrics.description: Total metrics related to user portfolio

totalPositions.description: Total number of open positions across all pools

balances.description: Total current position balances in USD
